The Government's Decisions:
Use of powers conferred under section 4 (1) (bb) of the Wildlife (Protection) Act, 1972
The following Honorary Wildlife Guardians have been appointed by the Government with effect from the date of their decision:
It is being done for three years.
Duties, Responsibilities and Rights of the Designated Honorary Conservator of Wildlife (Protection)
As prescribed in the Act, 1972 and as may be prescribed in this behalf by the Central Government from time to time.
The provisions will remain the same.
3. This Government Decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
